creator: remko@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->closed

I dont actually think we can solve the issue you are pointing out. We 
use ftp1,ftp2,[..]ftpX for our ftp naming scheme and ftp4 does not mean 
that it is IPV4 only, neither does ftp6 mean that it is IPV6 only, and 
changing this would go a bit to far in my opinion. Thanks for the 
submission though, i will close the PR.
